title: linaria dalmatica
intro: Linaria dalmatica, also known as Toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linaria dalmatica include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Linaria dalmatica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
